jsonLd.title: Yatra is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yatra family as a E-commerce Executive in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yatra:
Yatra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra!
